div.div:
Key Configurations:
- Fargate serverless node execution
- VPC Multi-AZ setup with NAT Gateway
- AWS Load Balancer Controller manages ALB Ingress
- IAM Roles for Service Accounts (IRSA) for least privilege
- Private subnets restrict direct external pod access
